metadata.description: Claude SEO Pro - the evidence-verified SEO command center for Claude Code. A hardened, client-ready distribution of the MIT-licensed claude-seo system (all 25 upstream sub-skills + 18 agents preserved) plus a Pro layer: guided API onboarding with secure credential storage, an anti-fabrication Evidence Integrity Protocol, a 4-phase audit pipeline with built-in multi-locale keyword research, persistent per-client knowledge store with a learning agent, dispatch-time model-cost routing, a Slack connector, white-label client reports under a mandatory 14-section depth contract, and CI-gated releases.

plugins.name: claude-seo-pro
plugins.description: Evidence-verified SEO command center: 30 skills (25 upstream + 5 Pro) and 19 specialist agents. Pro layer adds /seo-setup guided onboarding (DataForSEO, Google PSI/CrUX/GSC/GA4, GBP, Firecrawl, Exa, Slack - live-validated, owner-only storage), the Evidence Integrity Protocol (every finding cites file:line or an API field; missing data reports as 'Data pending', never estimated), a 4-phase audit (business intelligence -> evidence audit -> keyword research -> local/GBP), /seo-knowledge persistent client memory + /seo-learn learning agent, /seo-models cost routing (Haiku extraction / Sonnet reasoning / Opus synthesis), /seo-connect Slack bridge, and white-label PDF reports meeting a 14-section depth contract.
